rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that std::vector::push_back may reallocate the storage, invalidating iterators due to reallocation moving the underlying buffer.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes storing an index instead of an iterator and accessing the element by index after the loop, which eliminates the dangling read.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests storing an index instead of an iterator, which avoids storing iterators across mutating operations, satisfying the global_fix criterion.
